decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to control the game through spells and abilities that manipulate the opponent's board state while building up your own resources. By utilizing a combination of card draw, removal, and counter spells, the deck aims to out-value the opponent and create advantageous board positions. The cards in the deck provide a mix of control elements, card advantage, and efficient mana usage to establish dominance over the opponent and secure a victory through skillful play and strategic decision-making.

This Rakdos Aggro deck focuses on fast and aggressive plays, utilizing low-cost creatures like Bloodghast and Marauding Mako to quickly build a board presence. The deck also includes cards like Bloodthorn Flail and Monument to Endurance for additional damage and staying power. Tersa Lightshatter and Requiting Hex provide removal options against opposing threats, while Moonshadow offers card advantage. The mana base is designed to support a smooth curve of plays, allowing the deck to efficiently apply pressure and overwhelm opponents.

The main goal of this Izzet Control deck is to utilize various spells and abilities to control the board and outmaneuver your opponent. By casting spells like Gran-Gran, Combustion Technique, and Abandon Attachments, you can keep your opponent on the back foot while also drawing cards and generating mana. Monument to Endurance and Accumulate Wisdom help to ensure you have the resources you need to maintain control of the game. With a mix of powerful spells and efficient land choices, this deck aims to disrupt your opponent's strategy and secure victory through careful planning and resource management.

The focus of this deck is to overwhelm opponents quickly with a swarm of aggressive creatures in a mono green aggro strategy. By utilizing efficient low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to establish board presence early on. Cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer help to further boost the power of the creatures on the board. The deck also includes some utility lands like Fabled Passage and Ba Sing Se to ensure consistent mana production. Overall, this deck is designed to apply pressure and win the game fast.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly build a board presence by playing aggressive creatures like Floodpits Drowner and Spyglass Siren, while controlling the opponent's strategy with cards like Enduring Curiosity and Spell Stutter. The deck also includes cards like Tishana's Tidebinder and Requiting Hex for additional control and disruption. The inclusion of cards like Cecil, Dark Knight and Bitter Triumph provide additional support for the aggro strategy. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption to secure victory.

This deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with disruptive spells to control the board and push for early damage. Floodpits Drowner, Spyglass Siren, and Tishana's Tidebinder provide early board presence, while Cecil, Dark Knight and Deep-Cavern Bat offer additional pressure. Enduring Curiosity and Malcolm, Alluring Scoundrel help maintain card advantage. Requiting Hex and Bitter Triumph disrupt opponent's strategies, while Kaito, Bane of Nightmares serves as a finisher. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly while controlling the game with a mix of creatures and spells.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient mana ramping in order to quickly build a board presence and apply pressure. By utilizing a mix of early game mana accelerants like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo, along with threats like Badgermole Cub and Earthbender Ascension, the deck can quickly outpace opponents and push for a fast victory. The deck also includes some late game powerhouses like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter to provide additional finishing power if the game goes long.

This aggressive Rakdos deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of low-cost creatures and direct damage spells. Bloodghast, Flamewake Phoenix, and Marauding Mako provide a constant threat while Iron-Shield Elf and Moonshadow help control the board. Inti and Cecil offer additional aggressive options, while Bloodthorn Flail and Monument to Endurance provide extra damage output. Bitter Triumph and Requiting Hex serve as removal spells, with Case of the Crimson Pulse offering life gain. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to establish an early advantage and push for a quick victory.

The main concept of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while also disrupting their strategies with spells like Spell Snare and Get Lost. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Voice of Victory and High Noon, while also providing card advantage with Enduring Curiosity and No More Lies. Ajani, Outland Chaperone and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provide additional threats and win conditions. The deck utilizes a mix of Plains, Islands, and dual lands to ensure consistent mana base for casting spells.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing cards that allow for card draw, removal, and countering opponent's spells. The deck focuses on using Izzet colors (blue and red) to control the board through spells like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique. It also includes cards like Abandon Attachments and Monument to Endurance to generate card advantage and maintain board presence. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent and maintain control of the game through a combination of card advantage and removal spells.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and powerful creature abilities. By utilizing cards like Gran-Gran, Monument to Endurance, and Abandon Attachments, the player can manipulate the board state and disrupt their opponent's strategy. Additionally, cards like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique provide strong removal options, while Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent help maintain card advantage. The deck also includes some versatile spells like Boomerang Basics and Three Steps Ahead to adapt to different situations.

The main strategy of this Izzet Control deck is to control the board by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The deck aims to stall the opponent's game plan with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock while also dealing direct damage with spells like Burst Lightning. With a mix of creature removal, counterspells, and card draw, this deck is designed to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain control of the game until it can deploy powerful threats like Hearth Elemental and Glacial Dragonhunt to secure the win.

The main focus of this deck is to control the tempo of the game through countering opponent's spells, card draw, and removal spells. Eddymurk Crab, Hearth Elemental, and Sunderflock provide defensive creatures while Burst Lightning offers removal. Opt, Spell Snare, and Spell Pierce are key in countering opponent's spells, while Abandon Attachments and Spider-Sense can disrupt their strategy. Winternight Stories and Sleight of Hand help with card advantage and setting up the board. Glacial Dragonhunt and Into the Flood Maw offer powerful late-game plays. The mana base ensures consistency in casting spells and controlling the game.

The main concept of this Red Deck Wins Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Burnout Bashtronaut, Hexing Squelcher, and Nova Hellkite, backed up by burn spells like Burst Lightning, Shock, and Lightning Strike. The deck aims to establish board presence quickly and deal damage to the opponent efficiently, with little interaction or disruption. The deck is focused on quickly reducing the opponent's life total to zero before they have a chance to stabilize or turn the game around.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards that interact with the graveyard to bring back powerful creatures, creating a combo that can overwhelm the opponent. By strategically playing cards like Deceit and Requiting Hex to fill the graveyard and then using cards like Superior Spider-Man and Doomsday Excruciator to reanimate them, the deck aims to quickly build a threatening board presence. Cards like Insatiable Avarice and Deadly Cover-Up help protect the combo pieces, while Stock Up and Winternight Stories provide card advantage to keep the engine running smoothly.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful combo interactions to bring out high-value creatures from the graveyard, with a heavy emphasis on controlling the board and disrupting the opponent's strategy. By strategically utilizing various spells and abilities to reanimate key creatures and disrupt the opponent's plans, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence and secure victory through a combination of creature attacks and spell-based control.
